arts.ttl: WIlliam Saliba comments on Arsenal contract situation amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: William Saliba has commented on his contract situation at Arsenal after being linked with a move to Real Madrid. arts.ttl: How Hugo Ekitike would fit in Arsenal transfer plans as Alexander Isak replacement revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly following the situation surrounding Hugo Ekitike closely, which could see the striker become a Premier League player as a replacement for Alexander Isak . Therefore, signing Ekitike would be more feasible for Arsenal's transfer plans and allow them to make further additions, especially if they miss out on Sesko.

arts.ttl: William Saliba ‘really happy’ at Arsenal and thinking big in Champions League
arts.sum: French defender says he ‘wants to win big things here’ Arsenal take huge 7-1 lead into second leg against PSV William Saliba has insisted he is happy at Arsenal and believes he can achieve his dream of becoming the world’s best defender by helping them to win major trophies. The Frenchman will have two years on his contract in the summer and has been linked with Real Madrid in recent months. Saliba, who has excelled at Arsenal since he was recalled from Ligue 1 loans in 2022, said he had yet to open talks over a new deal but was adamant he wants to win silverware with the club. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal will ‘carry on fighting’ as Liverpool run away with Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says Arsenal keep fighting to win every game even as the Premier League title slips out of view. The Gunners dropped more points at the weekend, drawing 1-1 with Manchester United at Old Trafford, leaving them 15 points behind leaders Liverpool, who beat Southampton 3-1 at home. arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal captain slams Mikel Arteta in extraordinary rant - 'Not a top manager'
arts.sum: William Gallas spent four years at Arsenal and was club captain for almost half of that time but he has been left frustrated by Arsenal's recent shortcomings in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Arsenal one game away from Champions League nightmare as Mikel Arteta faces double dilemma
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has the chance on Wednesday night to send Arsenal through to the quarter-finals of the Champions League with a bang. This means that those Arsenal players on the a tightrope will also have to avoid being cautioned in the first leg of the quarter finals as well if they wish to feature in the away Madrid tie.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Saliba: I've not been so good this season
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba has admitted he has "not been so good" this season and said he needs to demand more of himself to help the club win silverware this season.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta finally responds to question that saw him storm out of Sky Sports interview
arts.sum: Arsenal's draw with Manchester United on Sunday left them 15 points behind Liverpool in the Premier League title race, and Mikel Arteta wasn't happy with some of the post match questioning

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘are in pole position’ to sign player despite Barcelona making efforts
arts.sum: Arsenal ‘are in pole position’ to sign goalkeeper Joan García from Espanyol despite Barcelona making efforts to sign him. That’s according to Cadena SER, who report that Barcelona have asked about the goalkeeper’s release clause but could be beaten by Arsenal.
